title: Searching for an Eva Song for my wedding
display_title: Searching for an Eva Song for my wedding
wikitext:
[]: Searching for an Eva Song for my wedding..             Quote Post by Ayumi » Mon May 05, 2014 2:42 pm Hi guys, I hope you can help me. I´m desperately searching for a slow version of "Good or don´t be" for my bridal march... My boyfriend and I get to know each other in an EVA Forum over 10 years ago and now we finally getting married. So I want "Good or don´t be" to be my song when I enter the chapel. But I need a version more slow than the original... So I hope someone can help me... Thanks a lot Ayumi PS: Sorry for my bad English-_-°

[]:             Quote Post by A.T. Fish » Mon May 05, 2014 4:31 pm The slowest version I found on youtube was this one , I'm not sure if there's a slower version in any official soundtrack so if you need it very slow you might need to hire a pianist and have him record it for you.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Mon May 05, 2014 5:57 pm Congratulations on your wedding! I guess that forum you mentioned wasn't this one.

[]:             Quote Post by tootiredtoriot » Mon May 05, 2014 7:55 pm Not a reply to OP, but the EoE performance of Jesus blibet Meinee Freunde is the most beautiful I've heard https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OK4SKxU3CRQ AND, it's the kind of song you could actually waltz to. So weird watching people try to waltz to 4/4 songs.

[]: Re: Searching for an Eva Song for my wedding..             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon May 05, 2014 8:41 pm Ayumi wrote: My boyfriend and I get to know each other in an EVA Forum over 10 years ago

[]: Re: Searching for an Eva Song for my wedding..             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon May 05, 2014 9:37 pm Ayumi wrote: My boyfriend and I get to know each other in an EVA Forum over 10 years ago

[]: Re: Searching for an Eva Song for my wedding..             Quote Post by AngelNo13Bardiel » Tue May 06, 2014 4:18 am ^ Yes, that does sound pretty rad. Ayumi wrote: My boyfriend and I get to know each other in an EVA Forum over 10 years ago and now we finally getting married.

[]:             Quote Post by Ayumi » Tue May 06, 2014 10:56 am Thanks a lot for your ideas! I'll try the S2 works, because I know someone who has them. I didn't think about asking him so far... My boyfriend and I met in a german Eva Forum called "NERVarchiv". Unfortunately it doesn't exist anymore.
